Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 1 2}You better be ready... 'Cause I'll do whatever it takes to win![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 1 5}Let both sides give it their all. No holds barred![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 1 2}It's gonna take a lot more than that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 5 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 1 5}Impressive... But I'll fight to the bitter end![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 1 5}Ha... There's a fire in your eyes. Let's see whose resolve burns brighter![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 11 1 2}Gotta push past the pain... I'm still not done![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 5 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 12 1 5}Yukari... Don't worry, I'll carry on your will![n]{f 1 1}
